title: Cajamarca, CJ — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cajamarca, CJ: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cajamarca is a city in CJ with a population of 250,000. A highland city where the Inca Empire fell, known for its thermal baths, dairy products, and colonial architecture.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
